QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_58

question.text: Which of the following NPS Tier II schemes provides tax benefit under Section 80C?

answer.text: NPS Tier II for all subscribers
NPS-TTS (Tier II Tax Saver) for Central Government employees only
NPS Tier II for subscribers above 60 years
No Tier II scheme provides 80C benefit

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS-TTS (Tier II Tax Saver) is available exclusively for Central Government employees and provides Section 80C benefit with a 3-year lock-in period. **The Trap:** NPS-TTS is not available to all subscribers or all government employees. It is restricted to Central Government employees only. **Cross-Exam Context:** NPS-TTS: 80C benefit, 3-year lock-in, 10-25% equity, up to 90% debt, up to 10% cash. Regular Tier II has no tax benefits. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For Central Government clients, NPS-TTS is an additional 80C instrument beyond regular NPS Tier I contributions.
